Canonical template for the [Daily Standup](/writing-style-catalog/reference/formats/daily-standup/) format.

```markdown
**Done**
- [Completed item - one line each]

**Next**
- [Next task or focus - one line each]

**Blockers**
- [What is blocked, what is needed, from whom - or "None"]
```
